member.name: M:GTA.ShapeTest.StartTestSweptSphere(GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,System.Single,GTA.IntersectFlags,GTA.Entity,GTA.ShapeTestOptions)
member.summary: Start a shape test against the area where swept sphere (ellipsoid) for shape test covers.
member.param: The positon where the shape test starts.
The positon where the shape test ends.
The radius of the swept sphere.
What type of objects the shape test should intersect with.

Specify an
that the shape test should exclude, leave null for no entities ignored.
Specify options for the spape test.
member.value:
The shape test handle. If this method fails to create the shape test request because there are too many ongoing requests,
will return
on the handle struct.
